projectDescription: An open-source, self-hostable web and product analytics platform that combines user-level tracking, session replay, funnels, and real-time dashboards — a privacy-first alternative to Mixpanel.
keyFeatures: Real-time analytics dashboards with funnels, cohorts, and retention analysis
Session replay with privacy controls (mask inputs, text masking, sample rates)
Multi-platform SDKs: Web, Next.js, React Native, Nuxt, Astro, Node.js
User profiles and identity tracking with group analytics
Self-hosting via Docker Compose with Postgres, ClickHouse, and Redis
Cookieless tracking and GDPR compliance out of the box
A/B testing and variant breakdown support
Revenue tracking with pending revenue support
Data export API for events and charts
publicApiSurface: POST /track — track events, identify users, manage groups, session replay
GET /track/device-id — fetch or create a device ID and session ID
OpenPanel.track(name, properties) — SDK: track a custom event
OpenPanel.upsertGroup(payload) — SDK: create or update a group
OpenPanel.setGroup(groupId) — SDK: assign current user to a group
OpenPanel.increment(payload) — SDK: increment a profile property
OpenPanel.decrement(payload) — SDK: decrement a profile property
OpenPanel.revenue(amount, properties) — SDK: track a revenue event
OpenPanel.screenView(path?, properties?) — SDK: track a page/screen view
OpenPanel.ready() — SDK: flush queued events after manual delay
OpenPanel.clear() — SDK: reset profile, groups, device/session IDs
